prompt: The pot is unopened and hero is on the button with ATo. Which compact preflop action fits best for this mixed-context checkpoint?
why_v1: On the button in an unopened pot, ATo is strong enough to open and take the initiative.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. On the button in an unopened pot, ATo is strong enough to open and take the initiative.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. On the button with ATo and no open in front, this is still a clean in-position start, so the right compact action is to raise.
